timeoutError: Request timed out - try again later
invalidDataSubmitted: The submitted data is not valid
noPermission: You don't have permission to perform this operation
conflict: Conflict - the resource was modified by another user
unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page or go back to the home page.
featureErrorMessage: An error occurred in {{featureName}}. Try reloading the component.
AUTH_IMPERSONATE_PARAMS_REQUIRED: Missing parameters: adminEmail, adminPassword and targetEmail are required
AUTH_IMPERSONATE_ROLE_DENIED: Access denied: only admins and PMs can impersonate users
AUTH_IMPERSONATE_COMPANY_MISMATCH: Access denied: PMs can only impersonate users from their own company
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Try again later.
RATE_LIMIT_LOGIN: Too many login attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
RATE_LIMIT_IMPERSONATE: Too many impersonation attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
USER_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Company, email, role, name and password are required
USER_UPDATE_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Email, role, status and name are required
USER_ADMIN_ROLE_DENIED: You don't have permission to assign the ADMIN role
USER_PASSWORDS_REQUIRED: Current password and new password are required
COMPANY_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Company code and name are required
COMPANY_ACCESS_MISSING: Access denied: missing or invalid company_id
COMPANY_ACCESS_DENIED: Access denied: you cannot operate on other companies
PROJECT_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Client, project code and title are required
PROJECT_CODE_DUPLICATE: Project code already exists for this company
PROJECT_PM_ROLE_REQUIRED: User must have PM or ADMIN role
PROJECT_PM_COMPANY_MISMATCH: User must belong to the same company as the project
PROJECT_PM_ALREADY_ASSIGNED: User already assigned as PM to this project
PROJECT_PM_NOT_ASSIGNED: User not assigned as PM to this project
PROJECT_TITLE_REQUIRED_FOR_KEY: Project title is required to generate the code
PROJECT_KEY_GENERATION_FAILED: Unable to generate a unique project code
CLIENT_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Company, client code and name are required
CLIENT_CODE_DUPLICATE: Client code already exists for this company
CLIENT_USER_IDS_REQUIRED: Client ID and User ID are required
CLIENT_TM_PROJECT_NOT_FOUND: T&M project not found for this client
CLIENT_USER_NOT_ASSIGNED: User not assigned to this client
CLIENT_PM_ALREADY_ASSIGNED: PM already assigned to this client
CLIENT_PM_NOT_ASSIGNED: PM not assigned to this client
TASK_USER_COMPANY_MISMATCH: Selected user does not belong to the same company as the project
TASK_UNAUTHORIZED_VIEW: You are not authorized to view this task's details
TASK_UNAUTHORIZED_MODIFY: You are not authorized to modify this task's details
TASK_ETC_INVALID: etc must be a non-negative number
TASK_DATES_REQUIRED_IN_PROGRESS: Start and end dates are required for IN PROGRESS tasks
TASK_DATE_RANGE_REQUIRED: Start date and end date parameters are required
TASK_END_BEFORE_START: End date must be after start date
TASK_BIWEEKLY_RANGE: Date range must be a multiple of 14 days
TIMESHEET_UNAUTHORIZED_TASK: You are not authorized to log hours for this task
TIMESHEET_INVALID_OR_SUBMITTED: Some timesheets are invalid or already submitted
TIMESHEET_UNAUTHORIZED_MODIFY: You are not authorized to modify this task
TIMESHEET_FIELDS_REQUIRED: task_id, work_date and hours_worked are required
TIMESHEET_IDS_REQUIRED: timesheet_ids must be a non-empty array
TIMEOFF_REQUIRED_FIELDS: time_off_type_id, date and hours are required
TIMEOFF_WEEKEND_NOT_ALLOWED: Cannot add time off on weekends
TIMEOFF_HOLIDAY_NOT_ALLOWED: Cannot add time off on public holidays
TIMEOFF_NOT_FOUND: Time off not found or unauthorized
HOLIDAY_DUPLICATE: Holiday with this name and date already exists
HOLIDAY_NOT_FOUND: Holiday not found or does not belong to your company
ESTIMATE_PROJECT_CLIENT_MISMATCH: Project does not belong to the specified client
ESTIMATE_PM_NOT_FOUND: Project Manager not found or unauthorized
ESTIMATE_INVALID_STATUS: Invalid status. Allowed values: DRAFT, CONVERTED
ESTIMATE_INVALID_PHASE_CONFIG: estimate_phase_config must be a valid JSON object
ESTIMATE_HOURS_NEGATIVE: hours_development_input must be greater than or equal to 0
ESTIMATE_CONVERT_REQUIRED: project_key, project_title, project_managers and tasks are required
ESTIMATE_INVALID_TASK: Each task must have a valid title and budget
ESTIMATE_DRAFT_REQUIRED: project_key, project_title and project_managers are required
ESTIMATE_TOTAL_DAYS_REQUIRED: total_days is required and must be a multiple of 10
ESTIMATE_ARRAY_VALUES: Field must contain integers between 1 and 10
SNAPSHOT_UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to access this snapshot
FILTER_MAX_PER_SECTION: Maximum number of filters per section reached
RECONCILIATION_NULL_USER_IDS: Some rows did not match any users
RECONCILIATION_CROSS_COMPANY: Query returns users from other companies
DRAFT_ESTIMATE_ACCESS_DENIED: You don't have permission to access this estimate
DRAFT_ACCESS_DENIED: You don't have permission to access this project draft
DRAFT_DELETE_DENIED: You don't have permission to delete this project draft
DRAFT_CONVERT_DENIED: You don't have permission to convert this project draft
